title: Axios supply chain attack chops away at npm trust

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Axios supply chain attack chops away at npm trust
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/04
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '142.11.206.73'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*6202033.vbs*'
            - '*node.js*'
            - '*setup.js*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Axios_supply_chain_attack_chops_away_at_ {
    meta:
        description = "Axios supply chain attack chops away at npm trust"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "07d889e2dadce6f3910dcbc253317d28ca61c766" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "2553649f2322049666871cea80a5d0d6adc700ca" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "d6f3f62fd3b9f5432f5782b62d8cfd5247d5ee71" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
suricata: alert ip any any -> 142.11.206.73 any (msg:"CDB APEX - Axios_supply_chain_attack_chop"; sid:8589396; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 142.11.206.73 any (msg:"CDB APEX Axios_supply_chain_attack_chop"; sid:8139705; rev:1;)
